18.reason: [The loop iterates over odd indices up to 2*N-1, but it should iterate over numbers 1 to N. This causes incorrect indexing and logic for generating permutations. Also, using global variable 'i' in recursion leads to interference between recursive calls.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [The loop iterates over odd indices up to 2*N-1, but it should iterate over numbers 1 to N. This causes incorrect indexing and logic for generating permutations. Also, using global variable 'i' in recursion leads to interference between recursive calls.]

20.reason: [Because 'i' is global and modified in recursive calls, the value of (i+1)/2 becomes unpredictable during backtracking, leading to incorrect marking/unmarking and skipped or duplicated numbers.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Because 'i' is global and modified in recursive calls, the value of (i+1)/2 becomes unpredictable during backtracking, leading to incorrect marking/unmarking and skipped or duplicated numbers.]

23.reason: [Writing only one character per number assumes single-digit numbers (which is okay for N<=10), but the indexing 'm' and 'm+1' doesn't align with the loop's step of i+=2; also, space is added at m+1 but next call uses m+2, which may leave trailing space or overwrite.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Writing only one character per number assumes single-digit numbers (which is okay for N<=10), but the indexing 'm' and 'm+1' doesn't align with the loop's step of i+=2; also, space is added at m+1 but next call uses m+2, which may leave trailing space or overwrite.]

25.reason: [Incrementing m by 2 assumes two characters per number (digit + space), but when n==0, the string is null-terminated at a[2*m], which may not match actual written length, possibly causing undefined behavior or extra spaces.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Incrementing m by 2 assumes two characters per number (digit + space), but when n==0, the string is null-terminated at a[2*m], which may not match actual written length, possibly causing undefined behavior or extra spaces.]
